name: Jellyfin Last.fm Plugin
description: Scrobble your music to Last.fm, update now playing status, and love/ban tracks directly from Jellyfin.
overview: Integrates Jellyfin with Last.fm for automatic scrobbling, now playing notifications, and track management (love/ban).

versions.changelog:
- Fix: Scrobble lost when changing tracks with Feishin (tracker key now uses DeviceId+ItemId)
- Prevents race condition when playback events arrive out of order during track transitions

- Fix: Scrobbling now works - LastfmScrobbler implements IHostedService for automatic startup
- Fix: Removed incompatible Microsoft.Extensions.* v10.0 references
- Fix: Plugin structure reorganized for clarity
